title: Trade Good (S07 Economy)
description: A single trade good in the ReachLock economy. The editor edits individual goods; a catalog wraps them in a GoodsCatalog { version, goods } keyed by id. Loaded from mods/reachlock/economy/goods.ron into reachlock_core::economy::Good.

id.description: Stable id, e.g. "water". Also the map key in GoodsCatalog

base_price.description: Reference mid-price in credits (the base every quote pivots on)

mass.description: Mass per unit in arbitrary cargo units (drives cargo capacity, S08)

category.description: Coarse bucket for UI grouping / legality rules

contraband.description: Whether selling it to a core-lawful station is a crime (S11+)
